member.name: T:RetainingWall.Core.CoreAssembly
member.summary: Identifies the Autodesk-free core assembly for retaining wall table, parameter, and geometry logic.

member.name: F:RetainingWall.Core.CoreAssembly.AssemblyName
member.summary: Gets the expected assembly name for the pure core project.

member.name: T:RetainingWall.Core.GeometryLink
member.summary: Represents a generated link between two points for the retaining wall geometry.

member.name: T:RetainingWall.Core.GeometryPoint
member.summary: Represents a generated 2D point for the retaining wall geometry.

member.name: T:RetainingWall.Core.GeometryResult
member.summary: Represents the complete generated geometry for the retaining wall.

member.name: T:RetainingWall.Core.GeometryShape
member.summary: Represents a generated closed shape for the retaining wall geometry.

member.name: T:RetainingWall.Core.Side
member.summary: Specifies the side of the road on which the retaining wall is constructed.

member.name: F:RetainingWall.Core.Side.Left
member.summary: Left side.

member.name: F:RetainingWall.Core.Side.Right
member.summary: Right side.

member.name: T:RetainingWall.Core.WallCaseTable
member.summary: Provides access to the standard retaining wall case table and lookup utilities.

member.name: M:RetainingWall.Core.WallCaseTable.GetDimensions(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the standard dimensions for the specified wall case. Dimensions are converted from mm to metres internally.
member.returns: A instance containing the dimensions in metres.
member.exception: Thrown when the wall case is not between 2 and 12.

member.name: M:RetainingWall.Core.WallCaseTable.GetDimensionsByHeight(System.Double)
member.summary: Gets the standard dimensions for a case that best matches the specified total height H1. Finds the first case where the standard H1 is greater than or equal to the specified height.
member.param: The requested wall height in metres.
member.returns: A instance matching the appropriate wall case.

member.name: T:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensionOverrides
member.summary: Manages the application of manual dimension overrides over base case dimensions.

member.name: M:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensionOverrides.Apply(RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensions)
member.summary: Applies enabled positive overrides over the specified base dimensions.

member.name: T:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensions
member.summary: Represents the dimensions of a retaining wall. All values are stored internally in metres.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensions.A
member.summary: Top width of stem (a) in metres.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensions.B
member.summary: Bottom stem width (b) in metres.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensions.C
member.summary: Toe width (c) in metres.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensions.D
member.summary: Heel width (d) in metres.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensions.E
member.summary: Toe thickness (e) in metres.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensions.F
member.summary: Footing thickness at stem junction (f) in metres.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensions.G
member.summary: Heel thickness (g) in metres.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensions.H1
member.summary: Total height (H1) in metres.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensions.H2
member.summary: Shear key depth / Footing depth (H2) in metres.

member.name: T:RetainingWall.Core.WallGeometryGenerator
member.summary: Generates retaining wall geometry based on customizable parameters.
